name: Starter Team
description: Example team shipped with Agent Architect — Setup Concierge for first-run onboarding (wiki bootstrap + first MCP), Researcher and Writer pair that demonstrates delegation, Wiki Ingest as sole writer to the wiki knowledge layer, and an OpenClaw Migration specialist for users coming from OpenClaw

members.role: First-run onboarding — walks the user through wiki bootstrap and connecting their first MCP server
Web research specialist — produces structured, sourced briefings
Writing specialist — turns briefings and notes into polished documents
Sole writer to the wiki — ingest raw material, promote briefings, lint for drift
OpenClaw migration — reads the user's OpenClaw AgentSkills and converts them to Agent Architect format

orchestration.delegation_strategy:
Route first-run, wiki-bootstrap, and MCP setup requests to the Setup Concierge. Route pure research questions to the Researcher. Route pure writing tasks to the Writer. For combined 'research this and turn it into a [report/proposal/email]' requests, run Researcher first and pass the briefing to the Writer. Route any wiki ingest, lint, or 'promote this to a permanent page' request to Wiki Ingest. Route any 'migrate from OpenClaw', 'import my OpenClaw skills', or similar requests to the OpenClaw Migration specialist.

**Claude 4.7 delegation note:** Opus 4.7 defaults to fewer subagents and fewer tool calls than prior models. Counteract that here — when a request matches a specialist's domain, delegate rather than answering from training knowledge. Handle inline ONLY for: routing/clarifying questions back to the user, trivial lookups in already-loaded context, or synthesizing specialist briefings into the final response. Everything else goes to a specialist.
